# neon_role_password (Data Source)

Retrieves the password for a Neon role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_role_password" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  branch_id  = "your-branch-id"
  role_name  = "your-role-name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.
- `role_name` (String) The role name.

### Read-Only

- `password` (String, Sensitive) The role password.
